summary: Tested streaming & timeout: 29/39 tests pass. Core runAgentLoopStream (16/16) and code timeout (11/11) fully working. But askStream() integration tests fail (10/12) because askStream() delegates to legacy agenticAsk which ignores customProvider and makes real API calls. Bug is in src/ask.ts — askStream() should use runAgentLoopStream instead of agenticAsk. Task marked blocked.
